name: Burnside Street
vibe: Major east-west arterial dividing north and south, Powell's, distinct bridge crossing

name: Hawthorne Boulevard
vibe: Quintessential SE Portland, vintage shopping, dining, laid-back hipster culture

name: Division Street
vibe: Foodie central, dense high-end restaurants, rapid development, very busy

name: Alberta Street
vibe: Arts district, murals, galleries, boutiques, diverse dining

name: Mississippi Avenue
vibe: Music venues, food carts, independent shops, lively nightlife area

name: NW 23rd Avenue
vibe: Upscale boutiques, national brands, fine dining, tree-lined historic street

name: Sandy Boulevard
vibe: Diagonal street cutting through NE, mid-century architecture, Hollywood Theater
